case_title: LANITA R. HOPKINS VS. GEORGE R. TURNER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-22-2010 CONTINUED TO NOV-24-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-24-2010 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Continued To Nov-24-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self represented plaintiff is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/24/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Continued To Sep-22-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
